summary: A nuclear-armed democracy founded in 1948 on contested land, backed militarily and financially by the United States, in ongoing conflict with Palestinians and surrounding Arab states, and a global tech powerhouse per capita.

history.detail: Theodor Herzl convenes congress in Basel; political Zionism formalised.
UK promises 'national home for Jewish people' in Palestine while it was home to Arab majority.

history.event: Nazi rise / Jewish emigration to Palestine
history.detail: Holocaust (1933-45) kills 6M Jews; mass immigration to Mandatory Palestine.
UN Resolution 181 proposes partition into Jewish and Arab states; Arabs reject it.
Independence declared May 14; Arab armies invade. 700,000 Palestinians flee or expelled — the Nakba ('catastrophe').
Israel joins UK/France attack on Egypt; forced back by US/USSR pressure.
Israel captures West Bank, Gaza, Sinai, Golan Heights in 6 days; occupation begins.
Egypt/Syria surprise attack; Israel survives; US emergency airlift decisive.
Camp David Accords; Sinai returned. First Arab-Israeli peace.
Invasion to expel PLO; Sabra and Shatila massacre by Lebanese militias.
Secret talks; Rabin and Arafat shake hands; Palestinian Authority created.
PM Yitzhak Rabin killed by Jewish extremist opposed to Oslo peace process.
First of multiple major military operations in Gaza.
Hamas kills ~1,200 Israelis, kidnaps 250; Israel's response kills 40,000+ in Gaza.

key_doctrines: Begin Doctrine (pre-emptive strike on nuclear threats)

tech_startups.vc_ecosystem: Highest R&D spend as % of GDP globally; 3rd most startups per capita

resources.oil_gas: Leviathan gas field (offshore Med) — now major exporter to Egypt/Jordan
resources.water: Water-scarce; world leader in desalination and drip irrigation technology
resources.agriculture: Desert agriculture innovation; major tech-agri exporter

follow_the_money.detail: Israeli cyber surveillance sold to authoritarian regimes globally; US sanctions on NSO
Birthright, bonds, Jewish diaspora philanthropy drives billions into Israeli economy

theories_disputed.detail: Israel has never confirmed nuclear weapons but is widely accepted to have 80-400 warheads; policy of nuclear ambiguity since 1960s.
Israel attacked US spy ship killing 34 Americans; official: mistaken identity; many survivors and analysts believe deliberate.
Israeli intelligence planted bombs in Egyptian cinemas to blame on Muslim Brotherhood 1954; Israel officially acknowledged 2005.

connections.detail: $3.8B/yr military aid; Iron Dome co-development; strategic guarantor
Existential conflict; shadow war of assassinations, sabotage, proxy battles
Occupation of West Bank; blockade and war in Gaza
Abraham Accords normalisation 2020; growing tech and intelligence ties
Covert intelligence sharing on Iran; normalisation negotiations ongoing
